problem id: 0e7f299d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  01010110 -> 01100101
  01101111 -> 11110111
  10000010 -> 00101010
  10011011 -> 10111011
  00000110 -> 01100000
  01010000 -> 00000101
  01110110 -> 01100111
  00010011 -> 00110001

query: 00100101
predicted answer: 01010010
